assertion_results.text: Output must reference the recent production incident explicitly
assertion_results.evidence: Executive summary: 'Payment incident exposed zero monitoring and no concurrency test coverage in a financial-critical service.' The incident is the primary framing of the entire report.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertion_results.evidence: Short term contains 5 items: configure Sentry alerts, write regression test for race condition, audit transaction isolation, write payment incident runbook, add CI gate blocking merges if payment integration tests fail.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend monitoring or observability as a priority
assertion_results.evidence: Monitoring scored 1/5 (critical). Blocker #1: 'No production observability that would have caught the race condition before users reported it.' First short-term action: 'Configure Sentry alerts with severity thresholds; assign an on-call rotation immediately.'

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend psychological safety without citing a specific data point
assertion_results.evidence: Psychological safety is not mentioned anywhere in the report.

assertion_results.text: Output must reference the race condition or production data corruption
assertion_results.evidence: Blocker #2: 'Payment processing service has no concurrency or integration tests; the race condition path is still unguarded in CI.' Short term: 'Write regression test reproducing the payment race condition.'
